title: 宝塚記念の後に・見知らぬ灼熱

text_block_list.name: Opera O and Doto
text_block_list.text:
Daaaaah!
Hyaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The peaceful mood before the race transforms in
an instant, and the Takarazuka Kinen becomes
the site of a fierce battle.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh... As always, the post-race air is divine...
Although...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
The level of purity is... a bit off. It's like several
times more concentrated than usual...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff... Doto, you've done well to arrive at the foot of my canopy.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
This is the meeting of chance I was promised. Our
tale begins here!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
None but I shall run ahead of you, and none shall
outpace me but you!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Opera O! I'm... so, so, so sorry to have kept you
waiting!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
But now that I've made it, I'll keep moving toward
you... step by step!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I want to become... someone I can be proud of!
And I... I need you for that!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
So, please, run with me again... and again and
again and again!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The crowd goes wild as the two announce their
rivalry.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Is this... the essence of Umamusume?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Or is it unique to Opera O and Doto?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
My ears are getting... hot... All the excitement has
gone to my head.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It must be from this fated match-up, right? It must
be because they're so special...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Digital, I appreciate your contribution to today's
performance. However...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Your turn awaits next time. Show us how you twirl
atop the sand.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Opera O...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Do your best, Digital. I'm planning to learn
something from watching you run on dirt too.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
O-okay. I'm not sure I can put on a race as
sublime as you two...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Still, watching your show—your race—has really
energized me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, we've been passed the baton, and we're
up next to perform in the Japan Dirt Derby. Our
search for the source of Umamusume greatness
continues.
